---
title: "Special Reports"
subtitle: "In-depth epidemiological analyses and focus reports from NMC surveillance data"
sidebar: special-reports
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
Special reports are detailed epidemiological analyses produced in response to emerging priorities, seasonal patterns, or public health concerns identified through NMC surveillance. New reports are added as priorities arise.
:::

```{=html}
<div class="report-grid">

  <div class="report-card">
    <div class="report-card-header poison">
      <i class="bi bi-exclamation-triangle-fill report-icon"></i>
    </div>
    <div class="report-card-body">
      <span class="report-badge badge-active">Active Priority</span>
      <h3 class="report-title">Agricultural &amp; Stock Remedy Poisoning</h3>
      <p class="report-meta">
        <i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> Updated: March 2026 &nbsp;|&nbsp;
        <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> National
      </p>
      <p class="report-desc">
        Comprehensive epidemiological description of agricultural and stock remedy poisoning 
        notifications in South Africa, 2020–present. Covers temporal trends, CUSUM signal 
        detection, seasonal patterns, age–sex demographics, provincial and district-level 
        geographical burden, mortality profile, and reporting delays.
      </p>
      <div class="report-tags">
        <span class="tag">Poisoning</span>
        <span class="tag">Trends</span>
        <span class="tag">Age–Sex</span>
        <span class="tag">Maps</span>
        <span class="tag">CFR</span>
      </div>
      <a href="agricultural-poisoning/index.html" class="report-btn">
        <i class="bi bi-arrow-right-circle"></i> View Report
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="report-card">
    <div class="report-card-header tb">
      <i class="bi bi-lungs-fill report-icon"></i>
    </div>
    <div class="report-card-body">
      <span class="report-badge badge-active">Active Priority</span>
      <h3 class="report-title">Tuberculosis Surveillance</h3>
      <p class="report-meta">
        <i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> Updated: March 2026 &nbsp;|&nbsp;
        <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> National
      </p>
      <p class="report-desc">
        Detailed epidemiological analysis of notifiable TB forms (pulmonary, extra-pulmonary, 
        MDR-TB, XDR-TB) reported through NMC, 2020–present. Includes drug-resistance trends, 
        age–sex demographics, provincial comparisons, and mortality profile.
      </p>
      <div class="report-tags">
        <span class="tag">MDR-TB</span>
        <span class="tag">XDR-TB</span>
        <span class="tag">Drug Resistance</span>
        <span class="tag">Trends</span>
        <span class="tag">CFR</span>
      </div>
      <a href="tuberculosis/index.html" class="report-btn">
        <i class="bi bi-arrow-right-circle"></i> View Report
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="report-card">
    <div class="report-card-header vpd">
      <i class="bi bi-shield-fill-plus report-icon"></i>
    </div>
    <div class="report-card-body">
      <span class="report-badge badge-active">Active Priority</span>
      <h3 class="report-title">Vaccine-Preventable Diseases</h3>
      <p class="report-meta">
        <i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> Updated: March 2026 &nbsp;|&nbsp;
        <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> National
      </p>
      <p class="report-desc">
        Comprehensive surveillance report on vaccine-preventable diseases including measles, 
        rubella, pertussis, diphtheria, tetanus, AFP (polio surveillance), Hib, hepatitis A/B, 
        and rabies. Covers EPI performance indicators and outbreak detection.
      </p>
      <div class="report-tags">
        <span class="tag">Measles</span>
        <span class="tag">Pertussis</span>
        <span class="tag">AFP</span>
        <span class="tag">EPI</span>
        <span class="tag">Under-5</span>
      </div>
      <a href="vaccine-preventable/index.html" class="report-btn">
        <i class="bi bi-arrow-right-circle"></i> View Report
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Template for future reports — copy and fill in details
  <div class="report-card">
    <div class="report-card-header [css-class]">
      <i class="bi bi-[icon] report-icon"></i>
    </div>
    <div class="report-card-body">
      <span class="report-badge badge-[status]">[Status]</span>
      <h3 class="report-title">[Title]</h3>
      <p class="report-meta">
        <i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> Updated: [Date] &nbsp;|&nbsp;
        <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> [Scope]
      </p>
      <p class="report-desc">[Description]</p>
      <div class="report-tags">
        <span class="tag">[Tag]</span>
      </div>
      <a href="[path]/index.html" class="report-btn">
        <i class="bi bi-arrow-right-circle"></i> View Report
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>
  -->

</div>
```

```{=html}
<style>
.report-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(320px, 1fr));
  gap: 1.5rem;
  margin-top: 1.5rem;
}

.report-card {
  border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
  border-radius: 10px;
  overflow: hidden;
  background: #fff;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.07);
  transition: box-shadow 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
}
.report-card:hover {
  box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.13);
  transform: translateY(-3px);
}

.report-card-header {
  padding: 1.4rem 1.4rem 1rem;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: flex-start;
}
.report-card-header.poison   { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #b71c1c 0%, #e53935 100%); }
.report-card-header.cholera  { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1565c0 0%, #1976d2 100%); }
.report-card-header.measles  { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #e65100 0%, #fb8c00 100%); }
.report-card-header.tb       { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #2e7d32 0%, #43a047 100%); }
.report-card-header.vpd      { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #6a1b9a 0%, #8e24aa 100%); }

.report-icon {
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.9);
  font-size: 2.2rem;
}

.report-card-body {
  padding: 1rem 1.4rem 1.4rem;
}

.report-badge {
  display: inline-block;
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  padding: 0.2em 0.65em;
  border-radius: 20px;
  margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
}
.badge-active   { background: #fef3c7; color: #92400e; border: 1px solid #fcd34d; }
.badge-seasonal { background: #dbeafe; color: #1e40af; border: 1px solid #93c5fd; }
.badge-archive  { background: #f3f4f6; color: #374151; border: 1px solid #d1d5db; }

.report-title {
  font-size: 1.1rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  margin: 0.2rem 0 0.4rem;
  color: #1f2937;
  line-height: 1.3;
}

.report-meta {
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  color: #6b7280;
  margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
}

.report-desc {
  font-size: 0.875rem;
  color: #374151;
  line-height: 1.55;
  margin-bottom: 0.9rem;
}

.report-tags {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.35rem;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}
.tag {
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  background: #f1f5f9;
  color: #475569;
  border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  border-radius: 4px;
  padding: 0.15em 0.55em;
}

.report-btn {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.4rem;
  background: #1e40af;
  color: #fff !important;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  padding: 0.45rem 1rem;
  border-radius: 6px;
  transition: background 0.2s;
}
.report-btn:hover { background: #1d4ed8; }
</style>
```
